overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage transitioning from driving through a neon-lit futuristic city street to walking through a landscaped urban plaza. The first segment features vehicle navigation through moderate traffic surrounded by towering skyscrapers and digital billboards, while the second segment shows pedestrian exploration of a tiered garden area with stairs and dense vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road with elevated transit and industrial facades

events.description: dissolve transition from driving scene to pedestrian plaza with stairs and greenery

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic on a multi-lane city street, maintaining lane position while approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed
black sports car overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: elevated transit track with orange support structure running parallel to the street
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk behind safety barriers
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on building facade
massive green industrial structure with circular ventilation fans and neon signage
thick industrial smoke rising from stacks between the downtown skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: Driving through a futuristic cyberpunk city street with an elevated rail line on the left and a massive green industrial facility on the right. The road features moderate traffic with various vehicles, while digital billboards and palm trees line the sidewalk. Industrial smoke rises in the distance between the towering skyscrapers under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: tiered pedestrian plaza with landscaped gardens and monumental stairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the pedestrian path, observing people ascending and descending the stairs while passing through the landscaped corridor

notable_agents.action: person in red top descending the wide concrete stairs
group of people walking along the plaza path ahead

entered.detail: wide monumental staircase with multiple tiers where pedestrians ascend and descend
raised concrete garden beds with shrubs and plants separating the walkway from the stairs
thick line of trees and bushes creating a green corridor along the path
modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade and large digital advertising screens
tall red-brick building with traditional architectural elements contrasting with modern structures

segments.scene_description: Walking through a landscaped urban plaza featuring wide concrete stairs on the left with people moving up and down, and dense vegetation on the right. The path runs between tiered garden planters, with modern glass towers and traditional brick buildings visible in the background. The atmosphere shifts from the industrial street to a more pedestrian-friendly green space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous transition from a high-speed drive through a dense industrial corridor into a serene, pedestrian-focused urban plaza. It begins by gliding through a futuristic city street, passing under an elevated rail line and beside a massive green industrial facility while digital billboards and palm trees line the road. As the camera moves forward through moderate traffic and past rising plumes of industrial smoke, the urban environment shifts from the scale of towering skyscrapers to a more intimate human level. The scene then opens into a landscaped plaza, where the road gives way to a path flanked by wide concrete stairs and tiered garden planters filled with dense vegetation. Finally, the perspective settles into a walk between modern glass towers and traditional brick buildings, completing the shift from a gritty industrial thoroughfare to a lush green space.
